## 📚 Documentation Issue

### Type of Issue
<!-- Check all that apply -->
- [ ] Missing documentation
- [ ] Incorrect/outdated information
- [ ] Unclear or confusing explanation
- [ ] Broken links or references
- [ ] Typo or grammar

### 📍 Location
<!-- Where is the problematic documentation? Provide a URL or file path. -->

### 📝 Current Content
<!-- What does the documentation currently say? (quote or describe) -->

### ✅ Expected Content
<!-- What should it say instead, or what's missing? -->

### 💬 Additional Context
<!-- Any other context or suggestions for improving the docs. -->
